_doc: Translated from Vibe-Transaction-Convertor/appliance.manifest.json (upstream uses an older flat schema and depends on a `llm-gateway` service the appliance does not yet ship). This manifest reroutes LLM access through the appliance's existing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY plumbing — operator picks the model via Settings → AI; no local LLM gateway required. GLM-OCR access uses the in-network address of vibe-glm-ocr when that app is also enabled. Open an upstream PR to align Vibe-Transaction-Convertor/appliance.manifest.json with this schema once the appliance side is verified.
description: Converts bank and credit-card PDF statements into CSV, OFX 2.x, QFX, and QBO Web Connect files for re-import into QuickBooks Online, QuickBooks Desktop, Quicken, and Xero.

optional.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
optional.doc: Claude API key. Required when LLM_PROVIDER=anthropic (the appliance default for this app). Inherited from appliance.env unless overridden.

ui.label: Anthropic API key
ui.helpText: Required for the AI-assisted extraction path. The appliance-wide key is used unless overridden per-app.

optional.name: ANTHROPIC_MODEL
optional.doc: Claude model used when LLM_PROVIDER=anthropic. Inherited from the appliance Settings → AI selection.

firstLogin.note: First request lands on /register because no users exist; create the admin there.
